It uses the Rust `tracing` crate for structured logging with multiple log levels. Debug logging is controlled via the `RUST_LOG` environment variable.\n11\t\n12\t## Available Debug Flags\n13\t\n14\t### Primary Environment Variable: `RUST_LOG`\n15\t\n16\tThe `RUST_LOG` environment variable controls which log statements are emitted. The `tracing-subscriber` crate's `env-filter` feature parses this variable at runtime.\n17\t\n18\t#### Syntax\n19\t```\n20\tRUST_LOG=<target>=<level>,<target2>=<level2>,...\n21\t```\n22\t\n23\t#### Available Log Levels\n24\t- `error` - Failures that prevent operation\n25\t- `warn` - (None currently used in Pluck)\n26\t- `info` - Significant events (split trigger, candidate return)\n27\t- `debug` - Detailed operation trace (filter stages, counts, decisions)\n28\t- `trace` - Most granular details (reserved for future expansion)\n29\t\n30\t#### Target Paths for Pluck\n31\t- `needle::strand::pluck` - Pluck strand specific\n32\t- `needle::strand` - All strand modules\n33\t- `needle::bead_store` - Bead store operations\n34\t- `needle::worker` - Worker lifecycle\n35\t- `needle::dispatch` - Agent dispatch\n36\t- `needle` - All NEEDLE modules\n37\t- (no target) - All crates globally\n38\t\n39\t### Common Usage Patterns\n40\t\n41\t#### Pluck-only Debug\n42\t```bash\n43\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug\n44\t```\n45\t\n46\t#### Pluck-only Trace (Maximum Verbosity)\n47\t```bash\n48\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace\n49\t```\n50\t\n51\t#### All NEEDLE Debug\n52\t```bash\n53\tRUST_LOG=needle=debug\n54\t```\n55\t\n56\t#### Everything Debug (Very Verbose)\n57\t```bash\n58\tRUST_LOG=debug\n59\t```\n60\t\n61\t#### Comprehensive Pluck Capture (Recommended)\n62\t```bash\n63\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\n64\t```\n65\t\n66\t## Pluck Debug Events\n67\t\n68\t### 1. Evaluation Start\n69\t```\n70\tDEBUG Pluck strand evaluation starting\n71\t  exclude_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n72\t  split_threshold: 3\n73\t```\n74\t\n75\t### 2. Bead Store Query\n76\t```\n77\tDEBUG Querying bead store for ready candidates\n78\t  filters: Filters { assignee: None, exclude_labels: [...] }\n79\t```\n80\t\n81\t### 3. Store Results\n82\t```\n83\tDEBUG Bead store returned {count} candidates\n84\t  count: 42\n85\t```\n86\t\n87\t### 4. Label Filtering\n88\tWhen beads are excluded:\n89\t```\n90\tDEBUG Label filtering excluded {excluded_count} beads\n91\t  excluded_count: 5\n92\t  remaining: 37\n93\t  excluded_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n94\t```\n95\t\n96\tFor each excluded bead:\n97\t```\n98\tDEBUG Excluded bead due to labels\n99\t  bead_id: \"bf-1234\"\n100\t  labels: [\"deferred\", \"priority:p2\"]\n101\t  excluded_reasons: [\"deferred\"]\n102\t```\n103\t\n104\t### 5. Status/Assignee Filtering\n105\t```\n106\tDEBUG Status/assignee filtering removed {filtered_count} beads\n107\t  filtered_count: 2\n108\t  remaining: 35\n109\t```\n110\t\n111\t### 6. Sorting\n112\t```\n113\tDEBUG Sorting {total} candidates by (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\n114\t  total: 35\n115\t  first_bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n116\t  first_priority: 1\n117\t  first_created_at: \"2026-07-09T00:00:00Z\"\n118\t```\n119\t\n120\t### 7. Split Trigger Check\n121\t```\n122\tDEBUG Checking split trigger for first candidate\n123\t  bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n124\t  failure_count: 0\n125\t  threshold: 3\n126\t  split_triggered: false\n127\t```\n128\t\n129\tWhen split is triggered:\n130\t```\n131\tINFO Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n132\t  bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n133\t  failure_count: 4\n134\t  threshold: 3\n135\t```\n136\t\n137\t### 8. Result Return\n138\tWhen candidates are found:\n139\t```\n140\tINFO Returning {count} candidates for processing\n141\t  count: 35\n142\t  candidates: [\"bf-0001\", \"bf-0002\", \"bf-0003\", ...]\n143\t```\n144\t\n145\tWhen no candidates remain:\n146\t```\n147\tDEBUG No candidates remaining after filtering, returning NoWork\n148\t```\n149\t\n150\t### 9. Error Cases\n151\t```\n152\tERROR Bead store query failed\n153\t  error: <error details>\n154\t```\n155\t\n156\t## How to Enable Debug Output\n157\t\n158\t### Method 1: Direct Environment Variable\n159\t```bash\n160\texport RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug\n161\tneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR\n162\t```\n163\t\n164\t### Method 2: Inline with Command\n165\t```bash\n166\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR\n167\t```\n168\t\n169\t### Method 3: Capture to File\n170\t```bash\n171\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR 2>&1 | tee pluck-debug.log\n172\t```\n173\t\n174\t### Method 4: Comprehensive Capture Script\n175\tThe provided `capture-pluck-debug.sh` script demonstrates a complete capture:\n176\t```bash\n177\t./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR pluck-debug-output.log 1\n178\t```\n179\t\n180\tThis sets:\n181\t```bash\n182\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\n183\t```\n184\t\n185\t## Filtering Decision Logging\n186\t\n187\t### Which Events Show Filtering Decisions?\n188\t\n189\tAll filter stages emit structured events:\n190\t\n191\t1. **Label filtering**: Logs count of excluded beads and reasons\n192\t2. **Status/assignee filtering**: Logs count of removed beads\n193\t3. **Individual exclusions**: Each excluded bead logs its ID, labels, and exclusion reasons\n194\t\n195\t### Key Fields for Debugging Filtering\n196\t\n197\t- `exclude_labels` - Labels being filtered\n198\t- `excluded_count` - How many beads were excluded\n199\t- `remaining` - How many beads remain after filtering\n200\t- `excluded_reasons` - Which labels caused exclusion\n201\t- `filters` - The filter object passed to the bead store\n202\t\n203\t## CLI Flags\n204\t\n205\t**Note:** NEEDLE does not provide CLI flags for debug logging configuration. All logging is controlled via the `RUST_LOG` environment variable.\n206\t\n207\tHowever, NEEDLE provides related logging commands:\n208\t\n209\t### `needle logs`\n210\tView and query telemetry logs:\n211\t```bash\n212\tneedle logs --follow                    # Stream events in real-time\n213\tneedle logs --filter 'event_type=bead.*'  # Filter events\n214\tneedle logs --since 1h                   # Events since 1 hour ago\n215\tneedle logs --format json               # JSON Lines output\n216\t```\n217\t\n218\t### `needle config --dump`\n219\tView resolved configuration including logging setup:\n220\t```bash\n221\tneedle config --dump                    # Show all config\n222\tneedle config --get telemetry.file_sink.enabled  # Get specific value\n223\t```\n224\t\n225\t## Tracing Instrumentation Details\n226\t\n227\t### Span Fields\n228\tAll Pluck events include these fields:\n229\t- `strand`: \"pluck\" - identifies the strand type\n230\t- `exclude_labels`: List of labels being filtered\n231\t- `split_threshold`: Failure count threshold for auto-split\n232\t\n233\t### Event Types\n234\t- `tracing::debug!()` - Detailed diagnostic information\n235\t- `tracing::info!()` - Significant operational events\n236\t- `tracing::error!()` - Failure events\n237\t\n238\t### Span Name\n239\tAll Pluck operations are tracked in the `strand.pluck` span.\n240\t\n241\t## Configuration Sources\n242\t\n243\tThe tracing subscriber is initialized in `src/cli/mod.rs`:\n244\t1. OTLP layer (if enabled in config)\n245\t2. fmt layer for stderr output\n246\t3. Environment variable filter (via `tracing-subscriber`'s `env-filter` feature)\n247\t\n248\t## Acceptance Criteria Verification\n249\t\n250\t✅ **List of available debug flags/variables found**\n251\t- Primary: `RUST_LOG` environment variable\n252\t- Levels: error, warn, info, debug, trace\n253\t- Targets: needle::strand::pluck, needle::strand, needle, etc.\n254\t\n255\t✅ **Documentation of which flags control filtering decision logging**\n256\t- `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug` enables all filtering decision logs\n257\t- Individual bead exclusions logged at DEBUG level\n258\t- Filter stage counts logged at DEBUG level\n259\t- Split trigger decisions logged at DEBUG/INFO level\n260\t\n261\t✅ **Clear instructions on how to enable debug output**\n262\t- Multiple methods documented (env var, inline, file capture, script)\n263\t- Comprehensive capture script provided\n264\t- Examples for all common scenarios\n265\t\n266\t## Related Documentation\n267\t\n268\t- **Pluck Filter Configurations:** See `bf-1jwl.md` for complete filter documentation\n269\t- **Pluck Debug Logging Guide:** See `bf-2hvf.md` for detailed event examples\n270\t- **Pluck exclude_labels:** See `bf-ogec.md` for exclude_labels extraction\n271\t- **NEEDLE Logging:** Check NEEDLE project docs for global logging configuration\n272\t- **capture-pluck-debug.sh:** Shell script demonstrating comprehensive debug capture\n273\t\n274\t## Future Enhancements\n275\t\n276\tPossible improvements for future work:\n277\t\n278\t1. **CLI Flags:** Add `--log-level` flag to avoid environment variable manipulation\n279\t2. **Filter Configuration:** Add ability to enable/disable specific log categories\n280\t3. **Structured JSON Output:** Emit logs in JSON format for easier parsing\n281\t4. **Per-Bead Timings:** Add timing information for each filtering stage\n282\t5. **Filter Decision Logs:** Emit specific reason for each bead's inclusion/exclusion\n283\t\n284\t---\n285\t\n286\t**Status:** ✅ Complete - It uses the Rust `tracing` crate for structured logging with multiple log levels. Debug logging is controlled via the `RUST_LOG` environment variable.\n\n## Available Debug Flags\n\n### Primary Environment Variable: `RUST_LOG`\n\nThe `RUST_LOG` environment variable controls which log statements are emitted. The `tracing-subscriber` crate's `env-filter` feature parses this variable at runtime.\n\n#### Syntax\n```\nRUST_LOG=<target>=<level>,<target2>=<level2>,...\n```\n\n#### Available Log Levels\n- `error` - Failures that prevent operation\n- `warn` - (None currently used in Pluck)\n- `info` - Significant events (split trigger, candidate return)\n- `debug` - Detailed operation trace (filter stages, counts, decisions)\n- `trace` - Most granular details (reserved for future expansion)\n\n#### Target Paths for Pluck\n- `needle::strand::pluck` - Pluck strand specific\n- `needle::strand` - All strand modules\n- `needle::bead_store` - Bead store operations\n- `needle::worker` - Worker lifecycle\n- `needle::dispatch` - Agent dispatch\n- `needle` - All NEEDLE modules\n- (no target) - All crates globally\n\n### Common Usage Patterns\n\n#### Pluck-only Debug\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug\n```\n\n#### Pluck-only Trace (Maximum Verbosity)\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace\n```\n\n#### All NEEDLE Debug\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle=debug\n```\n\n#### Everything Debug (Very Verbose)\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=debug\n```\n\n#### Comprehensive Pluck Capture (Recommended)\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\n```\n\n## Pluck Debug Events\n\n### 1. Evaluation Start\n```\nDEBUG Pluck strand evaluation starting\n  exclude_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n  split_threshold: 3\n```\n\n### 2. Bead Store Query\n```\nDEBUG Querying bead store for ready candidates\n  filters: Filters { assignee: None, exclude_labels: [...] }\n```\n\n### 3. Store Results\n```\nDEBUG Bead store returned {count} candidates\n  count: 42\n```\n\n### 4. Label Filtering\nWhen beads are excluded:\n```\nDEBUG Label filtering excluded {excluded_count} beads\n  excluded_count: 5\n  remaining: 37\n  excluded_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n```\n\nFor each excluded bead:\n```\nDEBUG Excluded bead due to labels\n  bead_id: \"bf-1234\"\n  labels: [\"deferred\", \"priority:p2\"]\n  excluded_reasons: [\"deferred\"]\n```\n\n### 5. Status/Assignee Filtering\n```\nDEBUG Status/assignee filtering removed {filtered_count} beads\n  filtered_count: 2\n  remaining: 35\n```\n\n### 6. Sorting\n```\nDEBUG Sorting {total} candidates by (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\n  total: 35\n  first_bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n  first_priority: 1\n  first_created_at: \"2026-07-09T00:00:00Z\"\n```\n\n### 7. Split Trigger Check\n```\nDEBUG Checking split trigger for first candidate\n  bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n  failure_count: 0\n  threshold: 3\n  split_triggered: false\n```\n\nWhen split is triggered:\n```\nINFO Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n  bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n  failure_count: 4\n  threshold: 3\n```\n\n### 8. Result Return\nWhen candidates are found:\n```\nINFO Returning {count} candidates for processing\n  count: 35\n  candidates: [\"bf-0001\", \"bf-0002\", \"bf-0003\", ...]\n```\n\nWhen no candidates remain:\n```\nDEBUG No candidates remaining after filtering, returning NoWork\n```\n\n### 9. Error Cases\n```\nERROR Bead store query failed\n  error: <error details>\n```\n\n## How to Enable Debug Output\n\n### Method 1: Direct Environment Variable\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR\n```\n\n### Method 2: Inline with Command\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR\n```\n\n### Method 3: Capture to File\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR 2>&1 | tee pluck-debug.log\n```\n\n### Method 4: Comprehensive Capture Script\nThe provided `capture-pluck-debug.sh` script demonstrates a complete capture:\n```bash\n./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR pluck-debug-output.log 1\n```\n\nThis sets:\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\n```\n\n## Filtering Decision Logging\n\n### Which Events Show Filtering Decisions?\n\nAll filter stages emit structured events:\n\n1. **Label filtering**: Logs count of excluded beads and reasons\n2. **Status/assignee filtering**: Logs count of removed beads\n3. **Individual exclusions**: Each excluded bead logs its ID, labels, and exclusion reasons\n\n### Key Fields for Debugging Filtering\n\n- `exclude_labels` - Labels being filtered\n- `excluded_count` - How many beads were excluded\n- `remaining` - How many beads remain after filtering\n- `excluded_reasons` - Which labels caused exclusion\n- `filters` - The filter object passed to the bead store\n\n## CLI Flags\n\n**Note:** NEEDLE does not provide CLI flags for debug logging configuration. All logging is controlled via the `RUST_LOG` environment variable.\n\nHowever, NEEDLE provides related logging commands:\n\n### `needle logs`\nView and query telemetry logs:\n```bash\nneedle logs --follow                    # Stream events in real-time\nneedle logs --filter 'event_type=bead.*'  # Filter events\nneedle logs --since 1h                   # Events since 1 hour ago\nneedle logs --format json               # JSON Lines output\n```\n\n### `needle config --dump`\nView resolved configuration including logging setup:\n```bash\nneedle config --dump                    # Show all config\nneedle config --get telemetry.file_sink.enabled  # Get specific value\n```\n\n## Tracing Instrumentation Details\n\n### Span Fields\nAll Pluck events include these fields:\n- `strand`: \"pluck\" - identifies the strand type\n- `exclude_labels`: List of labels being filtered\n- `split_threshold`: Failure count threshold for auto-split\n\n### Event Types\n- `tracing::debug!()` - Detailed diagnostic information\n- `tracing::info!()` - Significant operational events\n- `tracing::error!()` - Failure events\n\n### Span Name\nAll Pluck operations are tracked in the `strand.pluck` span.\n\n## Configuration Sources\n\nThe tracing subscriber is initialized in `src/cli/mod.rs`:\n1. OTLP layer (if enabled in config)\n2. fmt layer for stderr output\n3. Environment variable filter (via `tracing-subscriber`'s `env-filter` feature)\n\n## Acceptance Criteria Verification\n\n✅ **List of available debug flags/variables found**\n- Primary: `RUST_LOG` environment variable\n- Levels: error, warn, info, debug, trace\n- Targets: needle::strand::pluck, needle::strand, needle, etc.\n\n✅ **Documentation of which flags control filtering decision logging**\n- `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug` enables all filtering decision logs\n- Individual bead exclusions logged at DEBUG level\n- Filter stage counts logged at DEBUG level\n- Split trigger decisions logged at DEBUG/INFO level\n\n✅ **Clear instructions on how to enable debug output**\n- Multiple methods documented (env var, inline, file capture, script)\n- Comprehensive capture script provided\n- Examples for all common scenarios\n\n## Related Documentation\n\n- **Pluck Filter Configurations:** See `bf-1jwl.md` for complete filter documentation\n- **Pluck Debug Logging Guide:** See `bf-2hvf.md` for detailed event examples\n- **Pluck exclude_labels:** See `bf-ogec.md` for exclude_labels extraction\n- **NEEDLE Logging:** Check NEEDLE project docs for global logging configuration\n- **capture-pluck-debug.sh:** Shell script demonstrating comprehensive debug capture\n\n## Future Enhancements\n\nPossible improvements for future work:\n\n1. **CLI Flags:** Add `--log-level` flag to avoid environment variable manipulation\n2. **Filter Configuration:** Add ability to enable/disable specific log categories\n3. **Structured JSON Output:** Emit logs in JSON format for easier parsing\n4. **Per-Bead Timings:** Add timing information for each filtering stage\n5. **Filter Decision Logs:** Emit specific reason for each bead's inclusion/exclusion\n\n---\n\n**Status:** ✅ Complete - Pluck debug flags and logging configuration documented\n","numLines":287,"startLine":1,"totalLines":287}}}

All debug logging is controlled via the `RUST_LOG` environment variable using the standard Rust `tracing` crate syntax.\n6\t\n7\t## Primary Environment Variable: RUST_LOG\n8\t\n9\t**Syntax**: `RUST_LOG=<module>=<level>,<module>=<level>,...`\n10\t\n11\t**Available Log Levels** (in order of verbosity):\n12\t- `error` - Errors only\n13\t- `warn` - Warnings and errors  \n14\t- `info` - High-level operational events\n15\t- `debug` - Detailed operations and decisions\n16\t- `trace` - Most detailed - all operations including per-item decisions\n17\t\n18\t## Pluck-Specific Debug Targets\n19\t\n20\t### Pluck Strand Module\n21\t```\n22\tneedle::strand::pluck=trace     # Most detailed - all filtering decisions per bead\n23\tneedle::strand::pluck=debug     # Standard debugging - aggregate filtering stats\n24\tneedle::strand::pluck=info      # High-level operations only\n25\t```\n26\t\n27\t### All Available Strands\n28\t```\n29\tneedle::strand::pluck     # Primary bead selection\n30\tneedle::strand::mend      # Recovery strand\n31\tneedle::strand::explore   # Exploration strand\n32\tneedle::strand::weave     # Gap analysis strand\n33\tneedle::strand::unravel   # Dependency analysis strand\n34\tneedle::strand::pulse     # Health check strand\n35\tneedle::strand::reflect   # Learning consolidation strand\n36\tneedle::strand::splice    # Integration strand\n37\tneedle::strand::knot      # Dependency resolution strand\n38\t```\n39\t\n40\t## All Available NEEDLE Modules\n41\t\n42\t### Core Modules\n43\t```\n44\tneedle::dispatch          # Agent dispatch operations\n45\tneedle::worker            # Worker lifecycle and state transitions\n46\tneedle::telemetry         # Telemetry event logging\n47\tneedle::bead_store        # Bead store queries and operations\n48\tneedle::health            # Health checks and heartbeats\n49\tneedle::learning          # Learning system operations\n50\tneedle::sanitize          # Secret scanning and sanitization\n51\t```\n52\t\n53\t### Strand-Level Modules\n54\t```\n55\tneedle::strand            # All strand operations\n56\tneedle::strand::pluck     # Individual strand debugging\n57\t```\n58\t\n59\t## Recommended Debug Configurations\n60\t\n61\t### Comprehensive Pluck Debugging (Best for Filtering Issues)\n62\t```bash\n63\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\"\n64\t```\n65\t\n66\t### Pluck-Focused Debugging\n67\t```bash\n68\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\n69\t```\n70\t\n71\t### All Strand Operations\n72\t```bash\n73\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand=debug\"\n74\t```\n75\t\n76\t### Full Workspace Debugging\n77\t```bash\n78\texport RUST_LOG=\"debug\"\n79\t```\n80\t\n81\t### Minimal Pluck Info\n82\t```bash\n83\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=info\"\n84\t```\n85\t\n86\t## What Gets Logged at Each Level\n87\t\n88\t### needle::strand::pluck=trace (Most Detailed)\n89\t- **Initial strand evaluation**: Exact parameters (exclude_labels, split_threshold)\n90\t- **Bead store queries**: Exact filters being applied\n91\t- **Per-bead filtering decisions**: Individual bead IDs with labels and exclusion reasons\n92\t- **Label filtering**: Each bead excluded with specific labels that matched\n93\t- **Status/assignee filtering**: Per-bead status checks and assignee filtering\n94\t- **Split trigger checking**: Detailed failure count analysis per bead\n95\t- **Candidate sorting**: Sorting operations and final ordering\n96\t\n97\tExample output:\n98\t```\n99\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Pluck strand evaluation starting exclude_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] split_threshold=3\n100\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Querying bead store for ready candidates filters=Filters { assignee: None, exclude_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] }\n101\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: bead_id=bf-123 labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"] Excluded bead due to labels\n102\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: bead_id=bf-456 failure_count=3 threshold=3 split_triggered=true\n103\t```\n104\t\n105\t### needle::strand::pluck=debug (Standard Debugging)\n106\t- **Aggregate filtering statistics**: \"X beads excluded by labels\"\n107\t- **Remaining counts**: Candidate counts after each filter stage\n108\t- **Split triggers**: Threshold checks and split instruction generation\n109\t- **Final candidate lists**: Complete list of selected bead IDs\n110\t\n111\tExample output:\n112\t```\n113\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Label filtering excluded 3 beads\n114\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: excluded_count=3 remaining=7 excluded_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n115\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n116\tINFO needle::strand::pluck: count=5 candidates=[\"bf-123\", \"bf-456\"] Returning 5 candidates\n117\t```\n118\t\n119\t### needle::strand::pluck=info (High-Level Only)\n120\t- **Strand start/completion**: High-level lifecycle events\n121\t- **Final candidate counts**: Summary statistics\n122\t- **Split instruction triggers**: When splits are returned\n123\t\n124\tExample output:\n125\t```\n126\tINFO needle::worker: worker booted worker=alpha strands=[\"pluck\", \"mend\", \"explore\", ...]\n127\tINFO needle::strand::pluck: Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n128\t```\n129\t\n130\t## Key Logging Events and Patterns\n131\t\n132\t### Filtering Decision Logging\n133\t```\n134\t# Label filtering\n135\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Label filtering excluded 3 beads\n136\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: excluded_count=3 remaining=7 excluded_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n137\t\n138\t# Per-bead exclusion (trace level only)\n139\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: bead_id=bf-123 labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"] Excluded bead due to labels\n140\t\n141\t# Status/assignee filtering\n142\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Status/assignee filtering removed 2 beads\n143\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: filtered_count=2 remaining=5\n144\t```\n145\t\n146\t### Split Trigger Logging\n147\t```\n148\tDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: bead_id=bf-456 failure_count=3 threshold=3 split_triggered=true\n149\tINFO needle::strand::pluck: Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n150\t```\n151\t\n152\t### Candidate Selection Logging\n153\t```\n154\tINFO needle::strand::pluck: count=5 candidates=[\"bf-123\", \"bf-456\", \"bf-789\"] Returning 5 candidates for processing\n155\t```\n156\t\n157\t### Error Logging\n158\t```\n159\tERROR needle::strand::pluck: Bead store query failed error=bf list failed\n160\tWARN needle::strand: strand error, continuing to next strand strand=pluck error=bead store error: bf list failed elapsed_ms=2\n161\t```\n162\t\n163\t## Pluck Filtering Mechanism\n164\t\n165\tBased on code analysis, Pluck applies filters in this order:\n166\t\n167\t1. **Bead Store Query** - Initial query with basic filters\n168\t   - Filters: `assignee=None`, `exclude_labels=[deferred, human, blocked]`\n169\t   - Returns: Ready, unassigned beads\n170\t\n171\t2. **Label Filtering** - Defensive second pass\n172\t   - Removes beads with excluded labels (in case store query was incomplete)\n173\t   - Configurable via `exclude_labels`\n174\t\n175\t3. **Status/Assignee Filtering** - Remove in-progress beads\n176\t   - Filters out beads with status `in_progress` or `executing`\n177\t   - Removes stale assignments (timeout-based)\n178\t\n179\t4. **Sorting** - Deterministic ordering\n180\t   - Sort order: `(priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)`\n181\t   - Ensures consistent selection across runs\n182\t\n183\t5. **Split Trigger Check** - Check for split instructions\n184\t   - If `failure_count >= split_threshold`: Return Split instruction\n185\t   - Otherwise: Return list of candidates\n186\t\n187\t## Default Configuration\n188\t\n189\t### Default Exclude Labels\n190\tWhen not configured, Pluck excludes:\n191\t- `deferred` - Beads deferred for later processing\n192\t- `human` - Beads requiring human intervention  \n193\t- `blocked` - Beads blocked by dependencies\n194\t\n195\t### Default Split Threshold\n196\t- Default: `split_threshold=3`\n197\t- Trigger: When a bead has `failure_count >= 3`\n198\t\n199\t## Configuration Methods\n200\t\n201\t### Pluck Configuration (Not Debug Levels)\n202\tPluck's `exclude_labels` and `split_threshold` can be configured via:\n203\t\n204\t1. **Global Config**: `~/.config/needle/config.yaml`\n205\t   ```yaml\n206\t   strands:\n207\t     pluck:\n208\t       exclude_labels:\n209\t         - deferred\n210\t         - human\n211\t         - blocked\n212\t       split_threshold: 3\n213\t   ```\n214\t\n215\t2. **Workspace Config**: `.needle.yaml` in workspace root\n216\t   ```yaml\n217\t   strands:\n218\t     pluck:\n219\t       exclude_labels:\n220\t         - testing\n221\t       split_threshold: 5\n222\t   ```\n223\t\n224\t### Debug Logging Configuration (RUST_LOG Only)\n225\t**Important**: Debug logging levels cannot be set in config files - they are **only** controlled via the `RUST_LOG` environment variable at runtime.\n226\t\n227\t## Helper Script: capture-pluck-debug.sh\n228\t\n229\tA helper script exists for comprehensive debug capture:\n230\t\n231\t```bash\n232\t./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR output.log 1\n233\t```\n234\t\n235\t**What the script does:**\n236\t1. Sets comprehensive RUST_LOG configuration\n237\t2. Runs NEEDLE with the specified workspace and count\n238\t3. Captures all output to a timestamped log file\n239\t4. Provides analysis grep commands for common patterns\n240\t\n241\t**Script location**: `/home/coding/ARMOR/capture-pluck-debug.sh`\n242\t\n243\t## Analyzing Debug Output\n244\t\n245\t### Common Analysis Patterns\n246\t\n247\t**Find filtering decisions:**\n248\t```bash\n249\tgrep -i \"filter\" output.log\n250\tgrep -i \"exclude\" output.log\n251\t```\n252\t\n253\t**Find specific beads:**\n254\t```bash\n255\tgrep \"bf-123\" output.log\n256\t```\n257\t\n258\t**Find split operations:**\n259\t```bash\n260\tgrep -i \"split\" output.log\n261\t```\n262\t\n263\t**Find candidate selection:**\n264\t```bash\n265\tgrep -i \"candidate\" output.log\n266\t```\n267\t\n268\t**Find errors:**\n269\t```bash\n270\tgrep -i \"error\\|failed\" output.log\n271\t```\n272\t\n273\t## NEEDLE Logs Command\n274\t\n275\tThe `needle logs` command provides powerful filtering for telemetry logs:\n276\t\n277\t```bash\n278\t# View recent Pluck-related events\n279\tneedle logs --filter 'event_type~strand.*'\n280\t\n281\t# Follow logs in real-time\n282\tneedle logs --follow\n283\t\n284\t# Filter by specific event types\n285\tneedle logs --filter 'event_type=strand.started'\n286\t\n287\t# Time-based filtering\n288\tneedle logs --since 1h --filter 'event_type~pluck'\n289\t```\n290\t\n291\t## Common Debug Scenarios\n292\t\n293\t### Scenario: \"Why are beads being excluded?\"\n294\t\n295\t**Set**: `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug`\n296\t\n297\t**Look for**:\n298\t- \"Label filtering excluded\" messages\n299\t- \"Excluded bead due to labels\" with bead IDs and specific labels (at trace level)\n300\t- Check if `exclude_labels` match what you expect\n301\t\n302\t**Example**:\n303\t```bash\n304\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\n305\tneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -i \"exclude\"\n306\t```\n307\t\n308\t### Scenario: \"Why is split triggering?\"\n309\t\n310\t**Set**: `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug`\n311\t\n312\t**Look for**:\n313\t- \"Split threshold reached\" messages\n314\t- Check `failure_count` vs `threshold` values\n315\t- Look for \"failure-count:N\" labels on beads\n316\t\n317\t**Example**:\n318\t```bash\n319\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\n320\tneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -i \"split\"\n321\t```\n322\t\n323\t### Scenario: \"Why no candidates returned?\"\n324\t\n325\t**Set**: `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug`\n326\t\n327\t**Look for**:\n328\t- \"No candidates remaining after filtering\"\n329\t- Track how many beads removed at each filtering stage\n330\t- Check if all beads are excluded by labels, status, or assignee\n331\t\n332\t**Example**:\n333\t```bash\n334\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\n335\tneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -E \"remaining|candidate|filtering\"\n336\t```\n337\t\n338\t### Scenario: \"Bead store query failed\"\n339\t\n340\t**Set**: `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug,needle::bead_store=debug`\n341\t\n342\t**Look for**:\n343\t- \"Bead store query failed\" errors\n344\t- Bead store connection issues\n345\t- Check bead store health\n346\t\n347\t**Example**:\n348\t```bash\n349\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug,needle::bead_store=debug\"\n350\tneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -E \"bead.*store|query\"\n351\t```\n352\t\n353\t## Environment Variable Reference\n354\t\n355\t### Primary Variables\n356\t```bash\n357\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug    # Main debug **Pluck implementation**: `~/.local/bin/needle` (binary)\n371\t- **Tracing subscriber**: Initialized in NEEDLE binary at startup\n372\t- **Workspace config**: `.needle.yaml` (if present)\n373\t- **Global config**: `~/.config/needle/config.yaml`\n374\t\n375\t### Tracing Architecture\n376\tNEEDLE uses the `tracing` crate (not `log`) for structured logging:\n377\t- `tracing::debug!()` - Detailed operations\n378\t- `tracing::info!()` - High-level events\n379\t- `tracing::error!()` - Error conditions\n380\t- `tracing::warn!()` - Warning conditions\n381\t- `tracing::instrument` macro - Span-based tracing\n382\t\n383\t## Summary Table\n384\t\n385\t| Module Target | Purpose | Recommended Level |\n386\t|---------------|---------|------------------|\n387\t| `needle::strand::pluck` | debugging bead queries) |\n390\t| `needle::worker` | Worker lifecycle | `debug` (when debugging worker issues) |\n391\t| `needle::dispatch` | Agent dispatch | `debug` (when debugging dispatch issues) Pluck Debug Flags and Logging Configuration - Complete Guide\n\n## Executive Summary\n\nPluck is a strand within the NEEDLE system that handles primary bead selection from workspaces. All debug logging is controlled via the `RUST_LOG` environment variable using the standard Rust `tracing` crate syntax.\n\n## Primary Environment Variable: RUST_LOG\n\n**Syntax**: `RUST_LOG=<module>=<level>,<module>=<level>,...`\n\n**Available Log Levels** (in order of verbosity):\n- `error` - Errors only\n- `warn` - Warnings and errors  \n- `info` - High-level operational events\n- `debug` - Detailed operations and decisions\n- `trace` - Most detailed - all operations including per-item decisions\n\n## Pluck-Specific Debug Targets\n\n### Pluck Strand Module\n```\nneedle::strand::pluck=trace     # Most detailed - all filtering decisions per bead\nneedle::strand::pluck=debug     # Standard debugging - aggregate filtering stats\nneedle::strand::pluck=info      # High-level operations only\n```\n\n### All Available Strands\n```\nneedle::strand::pluck     # Primary bead selection\nneedle::strand::mend      # Recovery strand\nneedle::strand::explore   # Exploration strand\nneedle::strand::weave     # Gap analysis strand\nneedle::strand::unravel   # Dependency analysis strand\nneedle::strand::pulse     # Health check strand\nneedle::strand::reflect   # Learning consolidation strand\nneedle::strand::splice    # Integration strand\nneedle::strand::knot      # Dependency resolution strand\n```\n\n## All Available NEEDLE Modules\n\n### Core Modules\n```\nneedle::dispatch          # Agent dispatch operations\nneedle::worker            # Worker lifecycle and state transitions\nneedle::telemetry         # Telemetry event logging\nneedle::bead_store        # Bead store queries and operations\nneedle::health            # Health checks and heartbeats\nneedle::learning          # Learning system operations\nneedle::sanitize          # Secret scanning and sanitization\n```\n\n### Strand-Level Modules\n```\nneedle::strand            # All strand operations\nneedle::strand::pluck     # Individual strand debugging\n```\n\n## Recommended Debug Configurations\n\n### Comprehensive Pluck Debugging (Best for Filtering Issues)\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\"\n```\n\n### Pluck-Focused Debugging\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\n```\n\n### All Strand Operations\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand=debug\"\n```\n\n### Full Workspace Debugging\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"debug\"\n```\n\n### Minimal Pluck Info\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=info\"\n```\n\n## What Gets Logged at Each Level\n\n### needle::strand::pluck=trace (Most Detailed)\n- **Initial strand evaluation**: Exact parameters (exclude_labels, split_threshold)\n- **Bead store queries**: Exact filters being applied\n- **Per-bead filtering decisions**: Individual bead IDs with labels and exclusion reasons\n- **Label filtering**: Each bead excluded with specific labels that matched\n- **Status/assignee filtering**: Per-bead status checks and assignee filtering\n- **Split trigger checking**: Detailed failure count analysis per bead\n- **Candidate sorting**: Sorting operations and final ordering\n\nExample output:\n```\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Pluck strand evaluation starting exclude_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] split_threshold=3\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Querying bead store for ready candidates filters=Filters { assignee: None, exclude_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] }\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: bead_id=bf-123 labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"] Excluded bead due to labels\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: bead_id=bf-456 failure_count=3 threshold=3 split_triggered=true\n```\n\n### needle::strand::pluck=debug (Standard Debugging)\n- **Aggregate filtering statistics**: \"X beads excluded by labels\"\n- **Remaining counts**: Candidate counts after each filter stage\n- **Split triggers**: Threshold checks and split instruction generation\n- **Final candidate lists**: Complete list of selected bead IDs\n\nExample output:\n```\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Label filtering excluded 3 beads\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: excluded_count=3 remaining=7 excluded_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\nINFO needle::strand::pluck: count=5 candidates=[\"bf-123\", \"bf-456\"] Returning 5 candidates\n```\n\n### needle::strand::pluck=info (High-Level Only)\n- **Strand start/completion**: High-level lifecycle events\n- **Final candidate counts**: Summary statistics\n- **Split instruction triggers**: When splits are returned\n\nExample output:\n```\nINFO needle::worker: worker booted worker=alpha strands=[\"pluck\", \"mend\", \"explore\", ...]\nINFO needle::strand::pluck: Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n```\n\n## Key Logging Events and Patterns\n\n### Filtering Decision Logging\n```\n# Label filtering\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Label filtering excluded 3 beads\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: excluded_count=3 remaining=7 excluded_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n\n# Per-bead exclusion (trace level only)\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: bead_id=bf-123 labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"] Excluded bead due to labels\n\n# Status/assignee filtering\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Status/assignee filtering removed 2 beads\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: filtered_count=2 remaining=5\n```\n\n### Split Trigger Logging\n```\nDEBUG needle::strand::pluck: bead_id=bf-456 failure_count=3 threshold=3 split_triggered=true\nINFO needle::strand::pluck: Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n```\n\n### Candidate Selection Logging\n```\nINFO needle::strand::pluck: count=5 candidates=[\"bf-123\", \"bf-456\", \"bf-789\"] Returning 5 candidates for processing\n```\n\n### Error Logging\n```\nERROR needle::strand::pluck: Bead store query failed error=bf list failed\nWARN needle::strand: strand error, continuing to next strand strand=pluck error=bead store error: bf list failed elapsed_ms=2\n```\n\n## Pluck Filtering Mechanism\n\nBased on code analysis, Pluck applies filters in this order:\n\n1. **Bead Store Query** - Initial query with basic filters\n   - Filters: `assignee=None`, `exclude_labels=[deferred, human, blocked]`\n   - Returns: Ready, unassigned beads\n\n2. **Label Filtering** - Defensive second pass\n   - Removes beads with excluded labels (in case store query was incomplete)\n   - Configurable via `exclude_labels`\n\n3. **Status/Assignee Filtering** - Remove in-progress beads\n   - Filters out beads with status `in_progress` or `executing`\n   - Removes stale assignments (timeout-based)\n\n4. **Sorting** - Deterministic ordering\n   - Sort order: `(priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)`\n   - Ensures consistent selection across runs\n\n5. **Split Trigger Check** - Check for split instructions\n   - If `failure_count >= split_threshold`: Return Split instruction\n   - Otherwise: Return list of candidates\n\n## Default Configuration\n\n### Default Exclude Labels\nWhen not configured, Pluck excludes:\n- `deferred` - Beads deferred for later processing\n- `human` - Beads requiring human intervention  \n- `blocked` - Beads blocked by dependencies\n\n### Default Split Threshold\n- Default: `split_threshold=3`\n- Trigger: When a bead has `failure_count >= 3`\n\n## Configuration Methods\n\n### Pluck Configuration (Not Debug Levels)\nPluck's `exclude_labels` and `split_threshold` can be configured via:\n\n1. **Global Config**: `~/.config/needle/config.yaml`\n   ```yaml\n   strands:\n     pluck:\n       exclude_labels:\n         - deferred\n         - human\n         - blocked\n       split_threshold: 3\n   ```\n\n2. **Workspace Config**: `.needle.yaml` in workspace root\n   ```yaml\n   strands:\n     pluck:\n       exclude_labels:\n         - testing\n       split_threshold: 5\n   ```\n\n### Debug Logging Configuration (RUST_LOG Only)\n**Important**: Debug logging levels cannot be set in config files - they are **only** controlled via the `RUST_LOG` environment variable at runtime.\n\n## Helper Script: capture-pluck-debug.sh\n\nA helper script exists for comprehensive debug capture:\n\n```bash\n./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR output.log 1\n```\n\n**What the script does:**\n1. Sets comprehensive RUST_LOG configuration\n2. Runs NEEDLE with the specified workspace and count\n3. Captures all output to a timestamped log file\n4. Provides analysis grep commands for common patterns\n\n**Script location**: `/home/coding/ARMOR/capture-pluck-debug.sh`\n\n## Analyzing Debug Output\n\n### Common Analysis Patterns\n\n**Find filtering decisions:**\n```bash\ngrep -i \"filter\" output.log\ngrep -i \"exclude\" output.log\n```\n\n**Find specific beads:**\n```bash\ngrep \"bf-123\" output.log\n```\n\n**Find split operations:**\n```bash\ngrep -i \"split\" output.log\n```\n\n**Find candidate selection:**\n```bash\ngrep -i \"candidate\" output.log\n```\n\n**Find errors:**\n```bash\ngrep -i \"error\\|failed\" output.log\n```\n\n## NEEDLE Logs Command\n\nThe `needle logs` command provides powerful filtering for telemetry logs:\n\n```bash\n# View recent Pluck-related events\nneedle logs --filter 'event_type~strand.*'\n\n# Follow logs in real-time\nneedle logs --follow\n\n# Filter by specific event types\nneedle logs --filter 'event_type=strand.started'\n\n# Time-based filtering\nneedle logs --since 1h --filter 'event_type~pluck'\n```\n\n## Common Debug Scenarios\n\n### Scenario: \"Why are beads being excluded?\"\n\n**Set**: `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug`\n\n**Look for**:\n- \"Label filtering excluded\" messages\n- \"Excluded bead due to labels\" with bead IDs and specific labels (at trace level)\n- Check if `exclude_labels` match what you expect\n\n**Example**:\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -i \"exclude\"\n```\n\n### Scenario: \"Why is split triggering?\"\n\n**Set**: `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug`\n\n**Look for**:\n- \"Split threshold reached\" messages\n- Check `failure_count` vs `threshold` values\n- Look for \"failure-count:N\" labels on beads\n\n**Example**:\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -i \"split\"\n```\n\n### Scenario: \"Why no candidates returned?\"\n\n**Set**: `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug`\n\n**Look for**:\n- \"No candidates remaining after filtering\"\n- Track how many beads removed at each filtering stage\n- Check if all beads are excluded by labels, status, or assignee\n\n**Example**:\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -E \"remaining|candidate|filtering\"\n```\n\n### Scenario: \"Bead store query failed\"\n\n**Set**: `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug,needle::bead_store=debug`\n\n**Look for**:\n- \"Bead store query failed\" errors\n- Bead store connection issues\n- Check bead store health\n\n**Example**:\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug,needle::bead_store=debug\"\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -E \"bead.*store|query\"\n```\n\n## Environment Variable Reference\n\n### Primary Variables\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug    # Main debug control\n```\n\n### Secondary Variables (observed in environment)\n```bash\nRUST_TEST_THREADS=2                      # Rust test threading\nRUSTFLAGS=-C codegen-units=1            # Rust compilation flags\nNEEDLE_INNER=1                           # NEEDLE internal flag\n```\n\n## Code Architecture Reference\n\n### Key Locations\n- **Pluck implementation**: `~/.local/bin/needle` (binary)\n- **Tracing subscriber**: Initialized in NEEDLE binary at startup\n- **Workspace config**: `.needle.yaml` (if present)\n- **Global config**: `~/.config/needle/config.yaml`\n\n### Tracing Architecture\nNEEDLE uses the `tracing` crate (not `log`) for structured logging:\n- `tracing::debug!()` - Detailed operations\n- `tracing::info!()` - High-level events\n- `tracing::error!()` - Error conditions\n- `tracing::warn!()` - Warning conditions\n- `tracing::instrument` macro - Span-based tracing\n\n## Summary Table\n\n| Module Target | Purpose | Recommended Level |\n|---------------|---------|------------------|\n| `needle::strand::pluck` | Pluck strand filtering | `debug` (standard), `trace` (detailed) |\n| `needle::strand` | All strand operations | `debug` |\n| `needle::bead_store` | Bead store queries | `debug` (when debugging bead queries) |\n| `needle::worker` | Worker lifecycle | `debug` (when debugging worker issues) |\n| `needle::dispatch` | Agent dispatch | `debug` (when debugging dispatch issues) |\n| `needle::telemetry` | Telemetry events | `debug` (rarely needed) |\n| `needle::health` | Health checks | `info` (usually sufficient) |\n\n## Quick Reference Card\n\n```bash\n# Quick Pluck debug\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\n\n# Comprehensive Pluck debug\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug\"\n\n# Full NEEDLE debug\nexport RUST_LOG=\"debug\"\n\n# Run with debug\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1\n\n# Use helper script\n./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR output.log 1\n\n# Analyze output\ngrep -i \"pluck\\|filter\\|exclude\" output.log\n```\n\n## Version Information\n\n- **NEEDLE Version**: 0.2.11 (as of 2026-07-09)\n- **Tracing Crate**: Standard Rust `tracing` ecosystem\n- **Log Levels**: error, warn, info, debug, trace\n\n---\n\n**Document Created**: 2026-07-09  \n**Bead ID**: bf-5p3g {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_c0015737a3264b6ca89b778b","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# Pluck Debug Logging Guide\n2\t\n3\t**Bead:** bf-2hvf  \n4\t**Component:** NEEDLE Pluck Strand  \n5\t**Source:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs`  \n6\t**Date:** 2026-07-09\n7\t\n8\t## Overview\n9\t\n10\tPluck now includes comprehensive debug logging that traces the entire bead selection and filtering process. All logging is done via the `tracing` crate and can be enabled at runtime.\n11\t\n12\t---\n13\t\n14\t## Debug Events\n15\t\n16\tPluck emits the following debug events during execution:\n17\t\n18\t### 1. Evaluation Start\n19\t```\n20\tDEBUG Pluck strand evaluation starting\n21\t  exclude_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n22\t  split_threshold: 3\n23\t```\n24\t\n25\t### 2. Bead Store Query\n26\t```\n27\tDEBUG Querying bead store for ready candidates\n28\t  filters: Filters { assignee: None, exclude_labels: [...] }\n29\t```\n30\t\n31\t### 3. Store Results\n32\t```\n33\tDEBUG Bead store returned {count} candidates\n34\t  count: 42\n35\t```\n36\t\n37\t### 4. Label Filtering\n38\tWhen beads are excluded:\n39\t```\n40\tDEBUG Label filtering excluded {excluded_count} beads\n41\t  excluded_count: 5\n42\t  remaining: 37\n43\t  excluded_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n44\t```\n45\t\n46\tFor each excluded bead:\n47\t```\n48\tDEBUG Excluded bead due to labels\n49\t  bead_id: \"bf-1234\"\n50\t  labels: [\"deferred\", \"priority:p2\"]\n51\t  excluded_reasons: [\"deferred\"]\n52\t```\n53\t\n54\t### 5. Status/Assignee Filtering\n55\t```\n56\tDEBUG Status/assignee filtering removed {filtered_count} beads\n57\t  filtered_count: 2\n58\t  remaining: 35\n59\t```\n60\t\n61\t### 6. Sorting\n62\t```\n63\tDEBUG Sorting {total} candidates by (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\n64\t  total: 35\n65\t  first_bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n66\t  first_priority: 1\n67\t  first_created_at: \"2026-07-09T00:00:00Z\"\n68\t```\n69\t\n70\t### 7. Split Trigger Check\n71\t```\n72\tDEBUG Checking split trigger for first candidate\n73\t  bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n74\t  failure_count: 0\n75\t  threshold: 3\n76\t  split_triggered: false\n77\t```\n78\t\n79\tWhen split is triggered:\n80\t```\n81\tINFO Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n82\t  bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n83\t  failure_count: 4\n84\t  threshold: 3\n85\t```\n86\t\n87\t### 8. Result Return\n88\tWhen candidates are found:\n89\t```\n90\tINFO Returning {count} candidates for processing\n91\t  count: 35\n92\t  candidates: [\"bf-0001\", \"bf-0002\", \"bf-0003\", ...]\n93\t```\n94\t\n95\tWhen no candidates remain:\n96\t```\n97\tDEBUG No candidates remaining after filtering, returning NoWork\n98\t```\n99\t\n100\t---\n101\t\n102\t## Enabling Debug Logging\n103\t\n104\t### Method 1: Environment Variable (Recommended)\n105\t\n106\tSet the `RUST_LOG` environment variable to control tracing output:\n107\t\n108\t```bash\n109\t# Enable Pluck DEBUG level only\n110\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker\n111\t\n112\t# Enable Pluck TRACE level (most verbose)\n113\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace needle-worker\n114\t\n115\t# Enable DEBUG for all NEEDLE modules\n116\tRUST_LOG=needle=debug needle-worker\n117\t\n118\t# Enable DEBUG for everything (very verbose)\n119\tRUST_LOG=debug needle-worker\n120\t```\n121\t\n122\t### Method 2: Tracing Filter Directives\n123\t\n124\tUse tracing filter syntax for fine-grained control:\n125\t\n126\t```bash\n127\t# Pluck DEBUG + other crates INFO\n128\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug,info needle-worker\n129\t\n130\t# Pluck TRACE + NEEDLE INFO + other crates WARN\n131\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle=info,warn needle-worker\n132\t```\n133\t\n134\t### Method 3: Log File Output\n135\t\n136\tTo capture debug output to a file:\n137\t\n138\t```bash\n139\t# Enable DEBUG and redirect to file\n140\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker 2>&1 | tee pluck-debug.log\n141\t\n142\t# Or use a specific tracing subscriber with file output\n143\t# (requires application support for file appenders)\n144\t```\n145\t\n146\t---\n147\t\n148\t## Log Levels\n149\t\n150\t| Level | Usage | When to Use |\n151\t|-------|-------|-------------|\n152\t| **ERROR** | Failures that prevent operation | Store query failures |\n153\t| **WARN** | (None currently) | - |\n154\t| **INFO** | Significant events | Split trigger, candidate return |\n155\t| **DEBUG** | Detailed operation trace | Filter stages, counts, decisions |\n156\t| **TRACE** | Most granular details | (Reserved for future expansion) |\n157\t\n158\t---\n159\t\n160\t## Debug Output Examples\n161\t\n162\t### Example 1: Normal Operation\n163\t```bash\n164\t$ RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker\n165\t\n166\tDEBUG strand.pluck exclude_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] split_threshold=3 Pluck )\n266\t)]\n267\t```\n268\t\n269\t### Span Fields\n270\t\n271\tAll Pluck events include these fields:\n272\t- `strand`: \"pluck\" - identifies the strand type\n273\t- `exclude_labels`: List of labels Pluck Debug Logging Guide\n\n**Bead:** bf-2hvf  \n**Component:** NEEDLE Pluck Strand  \n**Source:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs`  \n**Date:** 2026-07-09\n\n## Overview\n\nPluck now includes comprehensive debug logging that traces the entire bead selection and filtering process. All logging is done via the `tracing` crate and can be enabled at runtime.\n\n---\n\n## Debug Events\n\nPluck emits the following debug events during execution:\n\n### 1. Evaluation Start\n```\nDEBUG Pluck strand evaluation starting\n  exclude_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n  split_threshold: 3\n```\n\n### 2. Bead Store Query\n```\nDEBUG Querying bead store for ready candidates\n  filters: Filters { assignee: None, exclude_labels: [...] }\n```\n\n### 3. Store Results\n```\nDEBUG Bead store returned {count} candidates\n  count: 42\n```\n\n### 4. Label Filtering\nWhen beads are excluded:\n```\nDEBUG Label filtering excluded {excluded_count} beads\n  excluded_count: 5\n  remaining: 37\n  excluded_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n```\n\nFor each excluded bead:\n```\nDEBUG Excluded bead due to labels\n  bead_id: \"bf-1234\"\n  labels: [\"deferred\", \"priority:p2\"]\n  excluded_reasons: [\"deferred\"]\n```\n\n### 5. Status/Assignee Filtering\n```\nDEBUG Status/assignee filtering removed {filtered_count} beads\n  filtered_count: 2\n  remaining: 35\n```\n\n### 6. Sorting\n```\nDEBUG Sorting {total} candidates by (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\n  total: 35\n  first_bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n  first_priority: 1\n  first_created_at: \"2026-07-09T00:00:00Z\"\n```\n\n### 7. Split Trigger Check\n```\nDEBUG Checking split trigger for first candidate\n  bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n  failure_count: 0\n  threshold: 3\n  split_triggered: false\n```\n\nWhen split is triggered:\n```\nINFO Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n  bead_id: \"bf-0001\"\n  failure_count: 4\n  threshold: 3\n```\n\n### 8. Result Return\nWhen candidates are found:\n```\nINFO Returning {count} candidates for processing\n  count: 35\n  candidates: [\"bf-0001\", \"bf-0002\", \"bf-0003\", ...]\n```\n\nWhen no candidates remain:\n```\nDEBUG No candidates remaining after filtering, returning NoWork\n```\n\n---\n\n## Enabling Debug Logging\n\n### Method 1: Environment Variable (Recommended)\n\nSet the `RUST_LOG` environment variable to control tracing output:\n\n```bash\n# Enable Pluck DEBUG level only\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker\n\n# Enable Pluck TRACE level (most verbose)\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace needle-worker\n\n# Enable DEBUG for all NEEDLE modules\nRUST_LOG=needle=debug needle-worker\n\n# Enable DEBUG for everything (very verbose)\nRUST_LOG=debug needle-worker\n```\n\n### Method 2: Tracing Filter Directives\n\nUse tracing filter syntax for fine-grained control:\n\n```bash\n# Pluck DEBUG + other crates INFO\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug,info needle-worker\n\n# Pluck TRACE + NEEDLE INFO + other crates WARN\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle=info,warn needle-worker\n```\n\n### Method 3: Log File Output\n\nTo capture debug output to a file:\n\n```bash\n# Enable DEBUG and redirect to file\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker 2>&1 | tee pluck-debug.log\n\n# Or use a specific tracing subscriber with file output\n# (requires application support for file appenders)\n```\n\n---\n\n## Log Levels\n\n| Level | Usage | When to Use |\n|-------|-------|-------------|\n| **ERROR** | Failures that prevent operation | Store query failures |\n| **WARN** | (None currently) | - |\n| **INFO** | Significant events | Split trigger, candidate return |\n| **DEBUG** | Detailed operation trace | Filter stages, counts, decisions |\n| **TRACE** | Most granular details | (Reserved for future expansion) |\n\n---\n\n## Debug Output Examples\n\n### Example 1: Normal Operation\n```bash\n$ RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker\n\nDEBUG strand.pluck exclude_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] split_threshold=3 Pluck strand evaluation starting\nDEBUG strand.pluck filters=Filters { assignee: None, exclude_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] } Querying bead store for ready candidates\nDEBUG strand.pluck count=42 Bead store returned 42 candidates\nDEBUG strand.pluck excluded_count=5 remaining=37 excluded_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] Label filtering excluded 5 beads\nDEBUG strand.pluck count=37 No beads excluded by status/assignee filter\nDEBUG strand.pluck total=37 first_bead_id=\"bf-0001\" first_priority=1 first_created_at=\"2026-07-09T00:00:00Z\" Sorting 37 candidates by (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\nDEBUG strand.pluck bead_id=\"bf-0001\" failure_count=0 threshold=3 split_triggered=false Checking split trigger for first candidate\nINFO strand.pluck count=37 candidates=[\"bf-0001\", \"bf-0002\", ...] Returning 37 candidates for processing\n```\n\n### Example 2: All Beads Filtered\n```bash\n$ RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker\n\nDEBUG strand.pluck Pluck strand evaluation starting\nDEBUG strand.pluck Querying bead store for ready candidates\nDEBUG strand.pluck count=3 Bead store returned 3 candidates\nDEBUG strand.pluck excluded_count=3 remaining=0 Label filtering excluded 3 beads\n  bead_id=\"bf-deferred\" labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"] Excluded bead due to labels\n  bead_id=\"bf-human\" labels=[\"human\"] excluded_reasons=[\"human\"] Excluded bead due to labels\n  bead_id=\"bf-blocked\" labels=[\"blocked\"] excluded_reasons=[\"blocked\"] Excluded bead due to labels\nDEBUG strand.pluck No candidates remaining after filtering, returning NoWork\n```\n\n### Example 3: Split Triggered\n```bash\n$ RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker\n\nDEBUG strand.pluck Pluck strand evaluation starting\nDEBUG strand.pluck count=1 Bead store returned 1 candidates\nDEBUG strand.pluck count=1 No beads excluded by label filter\nDEBUG strand.pluck count=1 No beads excluded by status/assignee filter\nDEBUG strand.pluck total=1 first_bead_id=\"bf-failing\" first_priority=2 first_created_at=\"2026-07-08T12:00:00Z\" Sorting 1 candidates by (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\nDEBUG strand.pluck bead_id=\"bf-failing\" failure_count=4 threshold=3 split_triggered=true Checking split trigger for first candidate\nINFO strand.pluck bead_id=\"bf-failing\" failure_count=4 threshold=3 Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n```\n\n---\n\n## Troubleshooting Pluck Filtering\n\n### Debugging Missing Beads\n\nIf you expect a bead to be selected but it's not appearing:\n\n1. **Enable debug logging:**\n   ```bash\n   RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker\n   ```\n\n2. **Check for exclusion events:** Look for \"Excluded bead due to labels\" entries\n\n3. **Verify labels:** Check the `excluded_reasons` field to see which labels caused exclusion\n\n4. **Check status/assignee:** Look for status filtering messages\n\n### Debugging Empty Queue\n\nWhen Pluck returns NoWork but you expect beads:\n\n1. **Check initial count:** \"Bead store returned N candidates\"\n   - If 0: No beads in ready state\n   - If >0: Beads are being filtered out\n\n2. **Track filtering stages:**\n   - \"Label filtering excluded N beads\"\n   - \"Status/assignee filtering removed N beads\"\n\n3. **Verify exclude_labels:** Check if default excludes (`deferred`, `human`, `blocked`) apply\n\n### Debugging Split Behavior\n\nTo understand why a bead is (or isn't) being split:\n\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle-worker\n```\n\nLook for the \"Checking split trigger\" event which shows:\n- `failure_count`: Current failure count from labels\n- `threshold`: Configured split threshold\n- `split_triggered`: Whether split will occur\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Details\n\n### Tracing Instrumentation\n\nPluck uses `tracing::instrument` for automatic span creation:\n\n```rust\n#[tracing::instrument(\n    name = \"strand.pluck\",\n    skip(self, store),\n    fields(\n        strand = \"pluck\",\n        exclude_labels = ?self.exclude_labels,\n        split_threshold = self.split_after_failures,\n    )\n)]\n```\n\n### Span Fields\n\nAll Pluck events include these fields:\n- `strand`: \"pluck\" - identifies the strand type\n- `exclude_labels`: List of labels being filtered\n- `split_threshold`: Failure count threshold for auto-split\n\n### Event Types\n\n- **macro:** `tracing::debug!()` - Detailed diagnostic information\n- **macro:** `tracing::info!()` - Significant operational events\n- **macro:** `tracing::error!()` - Failure events\n\n---\n\n## Related Documentation\n\n- **Pluck Filter Configurations:** See `bf-1jwl.md` for complete filter documentation\n- **Pluck exclude_labels:** See `bf-ogec.md` for exclude_labels extraction\n- **NEEDLE Logging:** Check NEEDLE project docs for global logging configuration\n\n---\n\n## Acceptance Criteria Verification\n\n✅ **Debug logging config to enable debug mode verified**\n- `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug` enables Pluck DEBUG\n- `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace` enables maximum verbosity\n- Works with standard tracing subscriber\n\n✅ **Debug output shows filtering logic execution**\n- Store query results logged\n- Each filtering stage (label, status/assignee) emits counts\n- Individual excluded beads logged with reasons\n- Sort operation logged with first candidate details\n- Split trigger check logged with decision\n- Final result (NoWork/BeadFound/Split) logged\n\n---\n\n## Future Enhancements\n\nPossible All debug logging is controlled via the `RUST_LOG` environment variable using the standard Rust `tracing` crate syntax.\n\n## Primary Environment Variable: RUST_LOG\n\n**Syntax**: `RUST_LOG=<module>=<level>,<module>=<level>,...`\n\n**Available Log Levels** (in order of verbosity):\n- `error` - Errors only\n- `warn` - Warnings and errors  \n- `info` - High-level operational events\n- `debug` - Detailed operations and decisions\n- `trace` - Most detailed - all operations including per-item decisions\n\n## Available Debug Targets\n\n### Pluck-Specific Targets\n```\nneedle::strand::pluck=trace     # Most detailed - all filtering decisions per bead\nneedle::strand::pluck=debug     # Standard debugging - aggregate filtering stats\nneedle::strand::pluck=info      # High-level operations only\n```\n\n### Related NEEDLE Modules\n```\nneedle::strand                 # All strand operations\nneedle::bead_store              # Bead store queries and operations\nneedle::worker                  # Worker lifecycle and state transitions\nneedle::dispatch                # Agent dispatch operations\nneedle::telemetry               # Telemetry event logging\nneedle                          # All NEEDLE modules\n```\n\n## Recommended Debug Configurations\n\n### Comprehensive Pluck Debugging (Best for Filtering Issues)\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\"\n```\n\n### Pluck-Focused Debugging\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\n```\n\n### Full Workspace Debugging\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"debug\"\n```\n\n## How to Enable Debug Output\n\n### Method 1: Direct Environment Variable\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR\n```\n\n### Method 2: Inline with Command\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR\n```\n\n### Method 3: Capture to File\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR 2>&1 | tee pluck-debug.log\n```\n\n### Method 4: Helper Script\n```bash\n./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR pluck-debug-output.log 1\n```\n\n## Filtering Decision Logging\n\n### What Gets Logged at Each Level\n\n**DEBUG level:**\n- Aggregate filtering statistics (\"X beads excluded by labels\")\n- Remaining counts after each filter stage\n- Split triggers and threshold checks\n- Final candidate lists\n\n**TRACE level:**\n- Individual bead IDs with labels and exclusion reasons\n- Per-bead filtering decisions\n- Detailed failure count analysis\n- Complete filtering pipeline\n\n### Key Filtering Events\n\n```\nDEBUG Pluck strand evaluation starting\n  exclude_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n  split_threshold: 3\n\nDEBUG Querying bead store for ready candidates\n  filters: Filters { assignee: None, exclude_labels: [...] }\n\nDEBUG Label filtering excluded 3 beads\n  excluded_count: 3\n  remaining: 7\n  excluded_labels: [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n\nDEBUG bead_id=bf-123 labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"]\n  Excluded bead due to labels\n\nDEBUG Status/assignee filtering removed 2 beads\n  filtered_count: 2\n  remaining: 5\n\nINFO Returning 5 candidates for processing\n  count: 5\n  candidates: [\"bf-123\", \"bf-456\", ...]\n```\n\n## Pluck Filtering Mechanism\n\nPluck applies filters in this order:\n\n1. **Bead Store Query** - Initial query with basic filters\n   - Filters: `assignee=None`, `exclude_labels=[deferred, human, blocked]`\n   - Returns: Ready, unassigned beads\n\n2. **Label Filtering** - Defensive second pass\n   - Removes beads with excluded labels\n   - Configurable via `exclude_labels`\n\n3. **Status/Assignee Filtering** - Remove in-progress beads\n   - Filters out beads with status `in_progress` or `executing`\n   - Removes stale assignments (timeout-based)\n\n4. **Sorting** - Deterministic ordering\n   - Sort order: `(priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)`\n\n5. **Split Trigger Check** - Check for split instructions\n   - If `failure_count >= split_threshold`: Return Split instruction\n   - Otherwise: Return list of candidates\n\n## Default Configuration\n\n### Default Exclude Labels\nWhen not configured, Pluck excludes:\n- `deferred` - Beads deferred for later processing\n- `human` - Beads requiring human intervention  \n- `blocked` - Beads blocked by dependencies\n\n### Default Split Threshold\n- Default: `split_threshold=3`\n- Trigger: When a bead has `failure_count >= 3`\n\n## Available Helper Scripts\n\n### capture-pluck-debug.sh\nComprehensive debug capture script with timestamped output:\n```bash\n./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR output.log 1\n```\n\n### execute-pluck-capture.sh\nExecution script with timeout protection and analysis:\n```bash\n./execute-pluck-capture.sh\n```\n\n## Environment Configuration File\n\nThe `.env.pluck-debug` file provides preset configurations:\n```bash\n# Source this file to enable debug logging\nsource .env.pluck-debug\n\n# Available configurations:\n# - Minimal: needle::strand::pluck=debug\n# - Comprehensive: needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,...\n# - Complete: All modules at debug level\n```\n\n## Common Debug Scenarios\n\n### \"Why are beads being excluded?\"\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -i \"exclude\"\n```\n\n### \"Why is split triggering?\"\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -i \"split\"\n```\n\n### \"Why no candidates returned?\"\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\nneedle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | grep -E \"remaining|candidate|filtering\"\n```\n\n## Key Documentation Files\n\n- **bf-5p3g-pluck-debug-flags.md** - Complete debug flags reference\n- **bf-5p3g-pluck-debug-complete-guide.md** - Comprehensive usage guide  \n- **bf-2hvf.md** - Debug logging events and patterns\n-
